description:
Build system detection rules for RuyiSDK VS Code Extension.

Priority order (highest wins):
  10 — CMake       : detected by CMakeLists.txt
   5 — GNU Make    : detected by Makefile / GNUmakefile / makefile
   1 — GCC (C)     : detected by any *.c file in the workspace root

To override, place a '.ruyi-build-rules.json' file in your workspace root
using the same schema. The workspace file replaces the bundled rules entirely,
so copy any rules you still need.

steps.name: Compile
steps.command: for f in *.c; do gcc "$f" -o "${f%.c}"; done
